name: ramp-reps-scope
description: `ramp` is a `Target` variant restricted to `load.value`/`Intensity.value` (§5.10) — it MUST fail schema validation on any other scalar-or-`Target` field. `reps: {ramp:{from,to}}` has no defined meaning (a directional progression of a discrete rep count) and is exactly the unscoped-`ramp` gap OB-46 closes: the base `Target` `$def` used by `reps`/`time`/`distance`/`energy`/`rest`/`sides.restBetween`/`Rep.velocity`/`Rep.rangeOfMotion` has no `ramp` branch; only the `load.value`/`Intensity.value` superset does.
